steps.title: Identify the elimination shortcut
steps.content: Notice that the coefficient of $x$ in equation (2) is exactly double the coefficient in equation (1): $10 = 2 \times 5$. This is the fastest path — after multiplying equation (1) by 2, subtract equation (2) to eliminate $x$.

steps.title: Eliminate x and solve for y
Substitute to find x and compute xy
